steps.t: Ulishár has come to Ingar-garâsh in southern Kighân.
Ulishár suggested that you travel to the cross-road north-west of the war-camp.
Ulishár stands beside the road that leads south-west to Zajâna.
Ulishár suggested that you continue to the south-west until you reach Khab Antâx, the Overgate outside Zajâna.
Ulishár stands by Khab Antâx, the Overgate outside Zajâna.
Ulishár suggested that you continue on into Zajâna itself.
Ulishár is inside the city of Zajâna.
